options.title: Alchemical Coffer
options.description: Gain [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] potion {PotionSlots:plural:slot|slots} filled with {PotionSlots:plural:a random potion|random potions}.

options.title: Archaic Tooth
options.description: [gold]Transform[/gold] {StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold] into [gold]{AncientCard}[/gold]|a starter card with an ancient version}.

options.title: Astrolabe
options.description: [gold]Transform[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}, then [gold]Upgrade[/gold] them.

options.title: Beautiful Bracelet
options.description: Choose [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] them with [purple]Swift {Swift}[/purple].

options.title: Biiig Hug
options.description: Remove [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], add a [gold]Soot[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

options.title: Black Star
options.description: [gold]Elites[/gold] drop an additional Relic when defeated.

options.title: Blessed Antler
options.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. At the start of each combat, shuffle [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

options.title: Blood-Soaked Rose
options.description: Add [blue]1[/blue] [red]Enthralled[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.

options.title: Brilliant Scarf
options.description: The [blue]5th[/blue] card you play each turn is free.

options.title: Calling Bell
options.description: Obtain a unique [red]Curse[/red] and [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]Relics[/gold].

options.title: Choices Paradox
options.description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Add [gold]Retain[/gold] to the chosen card.

options.title: Claws
options.description: [gold]Transform[/gold] up to [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} into [gold]Maul[/gold].

options.title: Crossbow
options.description: At the start of your turn, add a random [gold]Attack[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs [blue]0[/blue]{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.

options.title: Delicate Frond
options.description: At the start of each combat, fill all empty potion slots with random potions.

options.title: Diamond Diadem
options.description: Whenever you play [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] or fewer cards in a turn, take half damage from enemies.

options.title: Distinguished Cape
options.description: Lose [red]9[/red] Max HP. Add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Apparition|Apparitions}[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

options.title: Driftwood
options.description: You may reroll each card reward once.

options.title: Dusty Tome
options.description: Obtain {AncientCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}+[/gold]|an [gold]Ancient Card[/gold]}.

options.title: Ectoplasm
options.description: You can no longer gain [gold]Gold[/gold]. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.

options.title: Electric Shrymp
options.description: [gold]Enchant[/gold] a Skill with [purple]Imbued[/purple].

options.title: Empty Cage
options.description: Remove [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Deck[/gold].

options.title: Fiddle
options.description: At the start of each turn, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}. You may not draw cards during your turn.

options.title: Fur Coat
options.description: Mark [blue]{Combats}[/blue] random combats. Enemies in those rooms have [blue]1[/blue] HP.

options.title: Glass Eye
options.description: Upon pickup, obtain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Common[/gold] cards, [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Uncommon[/gold] cards, and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Rare[/gold] card.

options.title: Glitter
options.description: [gold]Enchant[/gold] all card rewards with [purple]Glam[/purple].

options.title: Golden Compass
options.description: Replace the [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] Map with a single special path.

options.title: Iron Club
options.description: Every [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} you play, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.

options.title: Jeweled Mask
options.description: At the start of combat put a random Power from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold], it's free to play.

options.title: Jewelry Box
options.description: Add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Apotheosis[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

options.title: Looming Fruit
options.description: Raise your Max HP by [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].

options.title: Lord's Parasol
options.description: When you encounter the [gold]Merchant[/gold], immediately obtain EVERYTHING he sells.

options.title: Meat Cleaver
options.description: You may [gold]Cook[/gold] at Rest Sites.

options.title: Music Box
options.description: Create an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] copy of the first Attack you play each turn.

options.title: Nutritious Soup
options.description: [gold]Enchant[/gold] all [gold]Strikes[/gold] in your [gold]Deck[/gold] with [purple]Tezcatara's Ember[/purple].

options.title: Pael's Blood
options.description: At the start of your turn, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}.

options.title: Pael's Claw
options.description: [gold]Enchant[/gold] all [gold]Defends[/gold] with [purple]{EnchantmentName}[/purple].

options.title: Pael's Eye
options.description: The first time each combat you end your turn without playing cards, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold], and take an extra turn.

options.title: Pael's Flesh
options.description: Gain an additional {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of your [blue]3rd[/blue] turn, and every turn after that.

options.title: Pael's Growth
options.description: [gold]Enchant[/gold] a card with [purple]{EnchantmentName}[/purple].

options.title: Pael's Horn
options.description: Add [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Relax[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

options.title: Pael's Legion
options.description: Doubles [gold]Block[/gold] gained from a card, then goes to sleep for [blue]{Turns}[/blue] {Turns:plural:turn|turns}.

options.title: Pael's Tears
options.description: If you end your turn with unspent {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, gain an additional {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn.

options.title: Pael's Tooth
Pael's Wing
options.description: You may sacrifice card rewards to Pael. Every {Sacrifices:plural:sacrifice|[blue]{}[/blue] sacrifices}, obtain a [gold]Relic[/gold].

options.title: Pandora's Box
options.description: [gold]Transform[/gold] ALL [gold]Strikes[/gold] and [gold]Defends[/gold].

options.title: Philosopher's Stone
options.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. ALL enemies start combat with [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

options.title: Preserved Fog
options.description: Remove [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Folly[/red] to your Deck.

options.title: Prismatic Gem
options.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. Card rewards now contain cards from other colors.

options.title: Pumpkin Candle
options.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. Extinguishes at the start of [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue].

options.title: Radiant Pearl
options.description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Luminesce|Luminesces}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

options.title: Runic Pyramid
options.description: At the end of your turn, you no longer discard your [gold]Hand[/gold].

options.title: Sai
options.description: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

options.title: Sand Castle
options.description: Upon pickup, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random {Cards:plural:card|cards}.

options.title: Seal of Gold
options.description: At the start of your turn, spend [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] to gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.

options.title: Sea Glass
options.description: See [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards from {Character.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|another character}. Choose any number of them to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

options.title: Sere Talon
options.description: Add [blue]{Curses}[/blue] random [red]Curses[/red] and [blue]{Wishes}[/blue] [purple]Wishes[/purple] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

options.title: Signet Ring
options.description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

options.title: Snecko Eye
options.description: At the start of your turn, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}. Start each combat [red]Confused[/red].

options.title: Sozu
options.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. You can no longer obtain potions.

options.title: Spiked Gauntlets
options.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. Powers cost [blue]1[/blue] more {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.

options.title: Storybook
options.description: Add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Brightest Flame[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

options.title: Tanx's Whistle
options.description: Add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Whistle[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

options.title: Throwing Axe
options.description: The first card you play each combat is played an extra time.

options.title: Toasty Mittens
options.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and gain [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

options.title: Touch of Orobas
options.description: Replace {StarterRelic.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterRelic}[/gold] with [gold]{UpgradedRelic}[/gold]|your starter [gold]Relic[/gold] with an [gold]Ancient[/gold] version}.

options.title: Toy Box
options.description: Obtain [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]Wax {Relics:plural:Relic|Relics}[/gold]. Every [blue]{Combats}[/blue] {Combats:plural:combat|combats}, your left-most [gold]Wax Relic[/gold] will melt away.

options.title: Tri-Boomerang
options.description: Choose [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Attack|Attacks} in your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] them with [purple]Instinct[/purple].

options.title: Velvet Choker
options.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. You cannot play more than [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} per turn.

options.title: Very Hot Cocoa
options.description: Start each combat with an additional [blue]{Energy:energyIcons()}[/blue].

options.title: War Hammer
options.description: Whenever you kill an [gold]Elite[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random {Cards:plural:card|cards}.

options.title: Whispering Earring
options.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. [red]Vakuu plays your first turn for you.[/red]

options.title: Yummy Cookie
options.description: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
